title: Apply Consistent Spacing to GameInfo Component Layout
description: Refactor GameInfo component to use design system spacing variables for consistent padding, alignment, and visual hierarchy. Improve organization of game controls and status information.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hardcoded spacing values with CSS variables (--spacing-*)
Consistent padding throughout component using design system values
Proper alignment of player indicator, status text, and reset button
Responsive spacing that works on mobile and desktop
Winner/draw state displays maintain visual hierarchy
All animations continue to work smoothly
No layout shifts between game states
technicalNotes: Review flex gap values for consistency
Ensure player indicator circle sizing is proportional
Test trophy and draw emoji animations with new spacing
testingStrategy: Visual regression tests for all game states (active, winner X, winner O, draw). Responsive tests on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
rollbackPlan: Revert to previous hardcoded spacing if layout breaks
